modules.name: Claude Cowork Fundamentals
modules.description: Master the core features of Claude Cowork through a hands-on scenario of your choice

lessons.name: Introduction
lessons.description: Welcome, course overview, and scenario introduction

lessons.name: Understanding Claude's Tools
lessons.description: Understand the three Claude products (Chat, Code, Cowork) and how to choose the right AI model

lessons.name: File Exploration
lessons.description: Navigate file structures and understand your workspace

lessons.name: Working with Files
lessons.description: Extract, synthesize, template, analyze images, web research

lessons.name: Cowork Features
lessons.description: Todo lists, conversation tips, and productivity features

lessons.name: Agents
lessons.description: Parallel processing with multiple Claude instances

lessons.name: Document Creation
lessons.description: Create professional Word, Excel, and PowerPoint documents

lessons.name: Web Research
lessons.description: Web search, content fetching, and browser automation

modules.name: Connectors, Plugins & Real Workflows
modules.description: Extend Claude with external tools, role-specific plugins, and build a real workflow for your job

lessons.name: Connectors
lessons.description: Link Claude to Slack, Notion, Google Calendar, and more

lessons.name: Plugins
lessons.description: Install pre-built toolkits designed for your role

lessons.name: Skills & Commands
lessons.description: Trigger powerful multi-step actions with a slash command

lessons.name: Customizing Plugins
lessons.description: Teach plugins your terminology, processes, and brand voice

lessons.name: Your First Real Workflow
lessons.description: Build something for your actual job with connectors and plugins

lessons.name: Wrap-up
lessons.description: Complete recap, celebration, and next steps
